resources.string: API switched to %1$s and is working
API switched to %1$s but test failed
Package menu with grouped selectable dishes.
Dish list not ready yet, please wait
Package name and price are required
Add at least one package section
Every package section needs an English name
Each package section needs at least one dish option
Ingredients not ready yet, please wait
Unable to load orders. Tap refresh.
Unable to parse orders. Tap refresh.
Are you sure you want to log out?
NFC is not supported on this device.
Table is available. No action needed.
Table is reserved. Waiting for guests.
Guests are seated. Ready to take order.
Points reminder: customer will earn about %1$d member point(s) after confirmation.
Takeaway cash payment confirmed! +%1$d member point(s).
No pending cash payments for this table yet. Create a dine-in cash order first.
Table #%1$d has no pending cash payment yet.
Failed to load detail, showing summary only
Enter the quantity to add or subtract.
This dish has no recipe configured yet.
Not enough stock to produce this item.
Stock has been updated. You can check the new stock levels in the Ingredients tab.
No real suggestions now. Loading demo data...

Period: %1$s ~ %2$s
Tracked ingredients: %3$d
Weekly consumed: %4$.2f
Activity records: %5$d (Deduction %6$d / Reorder %7$d / Forecast %8$d)
Top ingredient: %9$s
No manual activity log in the past 7 days.

Period: %1$s
Total Ingredients: %2$d
Needing Restock: %3$d
Total Restock Needed: %4$.2f units

Period: %1$s
Total Ingredients: %2$d
Below Warning Line: %3$d
Suggested Top-up Qty: %4$.2f
Tap a table to view details
Track current stock and quickly spot low ingredients.
Review AI predictions and approve or reject restock plans.
No consumption record in the past 7 days.
See what can be produced now based on current ingredient stock.
Confirm that cash payment has been received at the front desk?\n\nAfter confirmation, the order will proceed to kitchen preparation stage.
Confirm that cash payment has been received for this takeaway order?\n\nAfter confirmation, the order will proceed to kitchen preparation stage.
Create dish, translations, and recipe in one place
Build set meals by grouping dishes into selectable sections.
Choose one item from each section to complete your set.
Please select an order type first.
No coupons currently on this page.
Pay by Cash at Front Desk
Configure rules, discount scope, and translations
Create and monitor ingredient stock in one place
Add ingredient stock and threshold in one place
Login to earn and redeem points
Please select Dine In or Takeaway first
Please log in to access this feature.
Not enough points to redeem this coupon
You have already redeemed your birthday coupon this year.
Birthday coupon already used this year.
Please set your birthday to redeem this coupon
Birthday coupon can only be redeemed in your birthday month
Please log in to view history
No history found for this customer
Coupons can only be used during checkout
Coupon not valid for this cart
You can only use %1$d more of this coupon
Coupon applied (%1$d). Press Done when finished selecting.
You can reorder up to %1$d set(s).
Please enter a quantity between 1 and %1$d
Please enter a valid email address.
Login failed. Please check your credentials.
Please enter your email and password.
Please fill in your email address
Please fill in your confirm password
Password must be at least 6 characters
Alipay currently unavailable. Using Card instead.
Payment setup failed. Please try again.
Failed to initialize payment. Please try again.
Switched to Card payment (only option available)
Payment service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.
Payment method unavailable. Please try Card payment.

Sorry, we don't have enough ingredients to fulfill your order:

%1$s

Please remove some items from your cart or contact our staff.
Name and email cannot be empty
Special instructions are too long (max 500 characters)
This package is no longer available for reorder.
Some ingredients are currently unavailable. Please review your cart.
Failed to retrieve client secret from backend
Failed to save order. Please try again.
Please log in to make a booking
Booking time must be at least 1 hour from now
Please enter a valid number of people
No available tables for your criteria
Invalid customer account. Please login again.
Do you want to proceed anyway?
Booking cancelled. Please select another table.
Please enter your name and phone number
Added to cart but unable to verify ingredients: %1$s
Are you sure you want to cancel booking #%1$d?
